name: aspect-ratio-demo
visual_summary: A simple component that showcases aspect ratio boxes with various aspect ratios and background colors. This component is useful when you need to display images or content with different aspect ratios. It's ideal for demonstrating different layouts and styling.
generation_prompt:

Name: aspect-ratio-demo
Description: A simple component that showcases aspect ratio boxes with various aspect ratios and background colors. This component is useful when you need to display images or content with different aspect ratios. It's ideal for demonstrating different layouts and styling.
Style: e.g. minimal
Interactions: e.g. hover
Tags: aspect ratio, ratio, image, layout

Requirements:

- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling

- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types
